description: Fan-in hyperedges where a target task requires multiple upstream sources to be complete. Distinct from 'blocks' (which is binary). Captures multi-input convergence points.

edges.description: Delegation UI requires executor + proof attachment + message writer proof binding + trace observability all to be working before FEATURES.DELEGATION can flip to true.

Agentic legislative monitoring requires delegation executor + per-supporter alert infrastructure + state legislator data + special district data. Without any one, the 'monitor 24 boundary types' claim is not realizable.
Coalition cross-border campaign delivery requires cross-border campaign schema + CA + GB + AU rep-lookup. UK-only or CA-only delivery shells can ship earlier with partial requires.

Developer portal documents webhooks + OSDI + activity feed + real-time subscriptions. Per the planning agent's reframing, this must hold until all four endpoint families exist; an aspirational dev portal is worse than no portal.
engagementTier cross-check requires reputationTier writer (so server-side derived tier is non-zero) and tierMap default fix (so tierMap returns canonical values).
CAI honest requires tier writer + tierMap fix. Both are upstream substrate; CAI is editorial cleanup confirming inputs are honest.
Debate-to-tier promotion requires on-chain stake verification (so debate engagement only accrues from verified stakes) AND reputationTier writer (so promotion logic has a place to write).
IPFS-pinned campaign report artifact requires receipt anchoring pipeline (so Merkle proof exists) and mainnet anchor (so chain root is permanent).

Mainnet DebateMarket deployment requires mainnet DistrictRegistry + governance multisig (3-of-5 Safe on Scroll Mainnet) + AIEvaluationRegistry with pre-registered model signers (currently absent from script). Three operational prerequisites.
TEE-attested AI panel requires Nitro Enclave deployed (T5-3) + separate evaluator enclave image with vsock proxy whitelist for 5 API providers.
MMS support requires SMS dispatch live + A2P 10DLC registered (carriers reject MMS without proper brand registration).
Multi-jurisdiction routing benefits from both state and special district data but can ship with state-leg-only support (slot 2/3) before special districts are populated. Partial requires.
Per-district feed infrastructure same partial requires as T3-8 — state legislators give 2 slots of meaningful feeds; special districts add more later.
